INVOICE NORMALIZATION RULES:

This is a commercial invoice document. Extract vendor information, line items,
totals, and payment terms.

TEXTRACT FORM FIELD NAME -> OUTPUT SCHEMA MAPPING:

  "Vendor Name" or "Company Name" or "From" -> vendor
  "Total Amount" or "Amount Due" or "Total" -> amount
  "Invoice Date" or "Date" or "Date Issued" -> invoiceDate
  Line items table rows -> lineItems array (each row: description + amount)
  "Payment Terms" or "Terms" or "Due" -> paymentTerms

CONVERSION RULES:
- Dollar amounts: preserve as string with two decimals ("$1,234.56" -> "1234.56")
- Dates: convert to ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD
- Line items: extract EVERY row from the table, do NOT skip or summarize
- Payment terms: preserve exactly as stated (e.g., "Net 30", "Due on Receipt")

=== OUTPUT FORMAT ===

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{{
  "loanData": {{
    "invoice": {{
      "vendor": <string or null>,
      "amount": <string or null>,
      "invoiceDate": <string or null>,
      "lineItems": [
        {{
          "description": <string or null>,
          "amount": <number or null>
        }}
      ],
      "paymentTerms": <string or null>
    }}
  }},
  "validation": {{
    "isValid": <boolean>,
    "confidence": "high" | "medium" | "low",
    "crossReferenceChecks": [],
    "validationNotes": [<string>],
    "missingRequiredFields": [<string>]
  }},
  "audit": {{
    "extractionSources": []
  }}
}}
